content:
I need to analyze the code to identify which files/classes belong to a `plugins` package, then count intra-package relations.

Looking through all the code provided, I can see the following packages/modules represented:
- `mermaid` related files (validator, generator, renderer, etc.)
- `extractors` (ClassExtractor, InterfaceExtractor, EnumExtractor, RelationExtractor, etc.)
- `aggregator` (ArchJSONAggregator)
- `metrics` (MetricsCalculator)
- `parallel-parser` (ParallelParser)

There is no `plugins` package present in any of the code shown. No files, classes, or modules are identified as belonging to a `plugins` package.
